response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web engineer with strong testing and craftsmanship background, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems work. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems ownership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Far below 8-year C++ requirement; only brief C/C++ work at NI in 2014-2015
No evidence of internal cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
Recent stack (TypeScript/Node, DLang) does not align with C++ infrastructure focus

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale cloud/distributed compute platform background
